content: Standard mitigations for geofence false alerts: use DWELL transition (alert only after loitering N seconds inside boundary) instead of raw ENTER/EXIT; size geofence radius >=100m or add a buffer (e.g. 50ft) to absorb GPS/Wi-Fi drift; fuse GPS+Wi-Fi+Bluetooth+motion signals and weight by context (indoor vs moving) rather than relying on GPS alone.
